title: Job Openings at Proforce Galaxies
content:
Proforce Galaxies is an indigenous solution provider that proffer solutions to the myriad of new security challenges with the use of new discoveries in space and satellite technologies. Proforce Galaxies has the potency to offer top notch security surveillance of Homeland Security, Railway Track Monitoring, Crowd Control, Airport, Stadium, Border and Perimeter Surveillance and Oil & Gas Facility Protection, Defence and Law Enforcement Agencies with the use of homegrown deployed satellite.

We are recruiting to fill the following positions below:

1.) UI/UX Designer

Job Location: Ode-Remo, Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Overview
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Proforce Galaxies Limited is seeking a creative and detail-oriented UI/UX Designer to join our technology team.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for designing intuitive, user-centered interfaces that deliver seamless and engaging experiences across web, mobile, and desktop platforms.
	You will play a key role in transforming complex satellite and geospatial data into clear, visually compelling, and easy-to-use digital experiences.


Key Responsibilities
UI/UX Design:


	Lead the end-to-end design process from research and wireframes to high-fidelity designs.
	Create user-centered designs using tools such as Figma, Adobe XD, Sketch, or InVision.
	Develop intuitive interfaces that simplify complex data and workflows.
	Ensure consistency across all digital products through well-defined design systems.
	Conduct usability testing and apply feedback to improve user experience.
	Maintain accessibility and usability standards across all platforms.


Collaboration & Innovation:


	Work closely with developers, GIS analysts, and Computer Vision (AI) teams to translate requirements into functional designs.
	Design interactive dashboards, maps, and geospatial visualizations.
	Contribute to documentation of design systems, components, and workflows.
	Stay updated with UI/UX trends, tools, and best practices.


Qualifications


	Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Design, Human-Computer Interaction, Computer Science, or a related field.
	Minimum of 2–3 years of professional experience in UI/UX design.
	Strong portfolio showcasing user-centered design projects.
	Proficiency in design tools such as Figma, Adobe XD, Sketch, or InVision.
	Solid understanding of responsive design, accessibility standards, and usability principles.
	Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail.
	Excellent communication and collaboration skills.


Preferred Qualifications:


	Experience designing for data-heavy applications (e.g., dashboards, analytics platforms).
	Familiarity with geospatial or map-based interfaces.
	Basic understanding of front-end technologies (HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React).
	Experience working with real-time or data-driven interfaces.


Why Join Us?


	Salary Range: N200,000 – N300,000 per month. 
	This role offers the opportunity to design impactful digital experiences in the space-tech industry.
	At Proforce Galaxies Limited, you will contribute to shaping how users interact with satellite and geospatial data turning complexity into clarity through thoughtful design.


Application Closing Date: 15th April, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their updated CV, a Portfolio, links to past projects, Proof of hands-on experience to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

 

 

2.) Mobile App Developer

Job Location: Ode-Remo, Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	Proforce Galaxies Limited is seeking a Mobile App Developer to join our team of engineers and innovators. You will be responsible for creating powerful, intuitive, and scalable mobile applications that connect users directly to real-time satellite data and AI-driven insights.


Key Responsibilities


	App Development: Design, develop, and maintain mobile applications (Android & iOS) using React Native. Must have Excellent Knowledge of React Native.
	API Integration: Work with backend developers to integrate RESTful APIs, cloud services, and real-time geospatial data into mobile apps.
	Data Visualization: Collaborate with GIS analysts and AI engineers to build interactive dashboards, maps, and visualization tools for satellite imagery and analytics.
	Performance Optimization: Ensure applications are responsive, secure, and optimized for speed, scalability, and offline use where necessary.
	Cross-Platform Consistency: Build applications that deliver consistent user experiences across multiple devices and platforms.
	Testing & Debugging: Conduct unit, integration, and functional testing to ensure app reliability and stability.
	Collaboration: Work closely with front-end, backend, and AI teams to deliver seamless, end-to-end user solutions.
	Continuous Improvement: Stay updated on the latest mobile development frameworks, tools, and industry best practices.


Qualifications & Experience


	B.Sc. in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field.
	Proven experience (2+ years) as a Mobile App Developer or in a similar role.
	Proficiency in React Native.
	Strong knowledge of REST APIs, JSON, and third-party integrations.
	Experience with mobile app deployment to Google Play Store and Apple App Store.
	Familiarity with geospatial data, maps (Mapbox, Leaflet, Google Maps API), and data visualization is a plus.
	Understanding of mobile app security practices and offline-first design.
	Experience with Git version control, CI/CD pipelines, and containerization tools (Docker, Kubernetes) is desirable.


What We Offer


	Salary: N250,000 - N350,000 / Month and benefits package.
	Opportunity to work at the forefront of Africa’s space-tech revolution.
	A collaborative and innovative work environment.
	Access to high-impact projects with global relevance.
	Professional growth and development opportunities.


Application Closing Date: 31st March, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their updated CV, a Portfolio, links to past projects, Proof of hands-on experience to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: Only shortlisted Candidates will be contacted

 

 

3.) Front-End & UI/UX Developer (Web, Mobile & Desktop)

Job Location: Ode-Remo, Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a highly skilled and creative Front-End Developer with proven UI/UX design expertise to join our technology team.
	This is a dual-role position that requires strong hands-on experience in both front-end development and UI/UX design.
	The ideal candidate will not only build high-performance, responsive applications but also design intuitive and user-centered interfaces.
	You will be responsible for delivering seamless, engaging experiences across web, mobile, and desktop platforms, turning complex satellite and geospatial data into clear, impactful visual insights.


Key Responsibilities
Front-End Development:


	Design and develop responsive interfaces for web, mobile, and desktop applications using React framework.
	Integrate front-end applications with APIs to deliver real-time satellite imagery, analytics, and insights.
	Optimize applications for cross-platform and cross-browser compatibility, performance, and scalability.
	Conduct unit and integration testing to ensure reliability and functionality.


UI/UX Design:


	Lead and implement UI/UX processes from wireframes to high-fidelity designs.
	Use tools such as Figma, Sketch, Adobe XD, or InVision to create user-centered designs.
	Collaborate with multidisciplinary teams (GIS analysts, product managers, cybersecurity experts) to translate complex data into intuitive user experiences.
	Ensure accessibility, usability, and consistency across all platforms.


Collaboration & Innovation:


	Work with GIS analysts to design interactive maps, dashboards, and geospatial visualizations.
	Partner with cybersecurity professionals to safeguard front-end applications against vulnerabilities.
	Maintain documentation for design systems, UI components, and integration workflows.
	Stay updated with the latest in front-end frameworks, UI/UX best practices, and emerging design trends.


Qualifications


	Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Human-Computer Interaction, or related field.
	Minimum of 3 years of professional experience in front-end development with strong, demonstrable UI/UX design expertise.
	Proficiency in JavaScript/TypeScript, HTML, CSS, and React framework
	Proven ability to design and deliver high-quality UI/UX using tools such as Figma, Adobe XD, Sketch, or InVision.
	Strong grasp of responsive design, accessibility standards, and user-centered design principles.
	Excellent debugging, testing, and documentation skills.
	Ability to balance design creativity with technical execution.


Preferred Qualifications:


	Experience with geospatial visualization libraries (Leaflet, Mapbox, CesiumJS).
	Familiarity with mobile development (React Native).
	Knowledge of WebGL or 3D data visualization.
	Understanding of front-end security and data protection practices.
	Experience with real-time data feeds, IoT, or telemetry-based interfaces.
	Contributions to open-source front-end and UI/UX projects.


Salary
N250,000 - N350,000 per month. 

Why Join Us?


	This role is ideal for professionals who are equally passionate about crafting seamless user experiences and building robust, responsive applications. At Proforce Galaxies Limited, you’ll have the opportunity to shape the way global users interact with satellite and geospatial data—delivering clarity, usability, and impact.
	If you have strong hands-on expertise in both front-end development and UI/UX design, and are ready to push the boundaries of digital interaction, we’d love to hear from you.


Application Closing Date: 31st March, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV, Proof of hands-on experience and portfolio or links to past projects to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: Only shortlisted candidate will be contacted.

 

 

4.) Mobile App Developer

Job Location: Ode-Remo, Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	Proforce Galaxies Limited is seeking a Mobile App Developer to join our team of engineers and innovators.
	You will be responsible for creating powerful, intuitive, and scalable mobile applications that connect users directly to real-time satellite data and AI-driven insights.


Key Responsibilities


	App Development: Design, develop, and maintain mobile applications (Android & iOS) using React Native. Must have Excellent Knowledge of React Native.
	API Integration: Work with backend developers to integrate RESTful APIs, cloud services, and real-time geospatial data into mobile apps.
	Data Visualization: Collaborate with GIS analysts and AI engineers to build interactive dashboards, maps, and visualization tools for satellite imagery and analytics.
	Performance Optimization: Ensure applications are responsive, secure, and optimized for speed, scalability, and offline use where necessary.
	Cross-Platform Consistency: Build applications that deliver consistent user experiences across multiple devices and platforms.
	Testing & Debugging: Conduct unit, integration, and functional testing to ensure app reliability and stability.
	Collaboration: Work closely with front-end, backend, and AI teams to deliver seamless, end-to-end user solutions.
	Continuous Improvement: Stay updated on the latest mobile development frameworks, tools, and industry best practices.


Qualifications & Experience


	B.Sc. in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field.
	Proven experience (2+ years) as a Mobile App Developer or in a similar role.
	Proficiency in React Native.
	Strong knowledge of REST APIs, JSON, and third-party integrations.
	Experience with mobile app deployment to Google Play Store and Apple App Store.
	Familiarity with geospatial data, maps (Mapbox, Leaflet, Google Maps API), and data visualization is a plus.
	Understanding of mobile app security practices and offline-first design.
	Experience with Git version control, CI / CD pipelines, and containerization tools (Docker, Kubernetes) is desirable.


What We Offer


	Salary: N250,000 - N350,000 / month.
	Opportunity to work at the forefront of Africa’s space-tech revolution.
	A collaborative and innovative work environment.
	Access to high-impact projects with global relevance.
	Professional growth and development opportunities.


Application Closing Date: 31st March, 2026.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their updated CV and a portfolio / links to past projects with proof of hands-on experience to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note: Only shortlisted Candidates will be contacted.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Software Engineer (Backend) Job at Proliance Limited




        
    

        
        Proliance Limited is a Business and Management Consulting, ICT & Enterprise, Supply Chain Management, Learning & Development, QA/QC services provider in the Energy and Natural Resources, Healthcare, Manufacturing, Technology and Communication, Food and Agriculture Industries, Government and International Development Agencies. Proliance Ltd was founded in 2017 by a team of seasoned management consultant and conformity assessment professionals with TRUTH and INTEGRITY as the core foundation to provide solutions that meet our clients’ needs.

We provide tailored and solution-based training programmes within the core areas of our services to ensure that participants are well equipped with the required skill and knowledge to make the right impact.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Software Engineer (Backend)
Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Promote software development best practices and conduct rigorous code reviews, data analysis, and troubleshooting
	Develop and implement comprehensive technology solutions that effectively tackle process improvement challenges.
	Work closely with the front-end and technical innovation team to establish technical and design objectives to enhance user experience.
	Continually improve server and server-side applications
	Design effective APIs for mobile and desktop solutions
	Carry out UI tests to optimize performance
	Control and ensure the development of web and mobile application projects implementation plans/schedules
	Creatively maintain and ensure system optimization and cloud distribution
	Ensure compliance with project quality assurance, codes, and standards governing each developmental project.
	Continually study industry trends to create and improve business processes and codes for better programme designs.
	Take part in the training of internal and client product users, as applicable, on use of products
	Create and optimize systems, and play an active role in testing and troubleshooting activities
	Coordinate change order management process in liaison with the Technical Innovation Team and other relevant stakeholders
	Provide technical and professional advice for successful project delivery and system improvement programmes
	Maintain good working relationships with internal stakeholders and other relevant interested parties
	All other assigned functions by the Managing Partner/Technical Innovation Manager.


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess relevant qualifications with experience.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

title: Job Openings at Sinotech Company Limited
content:
(adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    

Sinotech Company Limited (stock code: 688737) was founded in2005 and went public on the SSE STAR Market in 2021. The company is dedicated to the research and development of energy storage batteries, powerbatteries, hydrogen fuel cells, electrocatalysts, and othernew materials within the new energy field. It integratestechnology, R&D, production, sales, and service,makingit a comprehensive high-tech enterprise. Sinotech Company Limited has developed in-depth cooperationwith the University of Electronic Science and Technologyin the fields of liquid lithium-ion batteries, solid-state lithium batteries, and sodium-ion batteries. The lithiumbatteries produced by Sinotech boast several coreadvantages, including long life, high safety, and lowtemperature resistance.In the context of carbon reduction and pollution reduction,Sinotech Co., Ltd. actively supports the fight to protect theblue sky. The company adopts the mission of "combatingair pollution and realizing the dream of blue sky and whiteclouds,"takes the construction of national ecologicalcivilization as its responsibility, and contributes toachieving carbon peak and carbon neutrality.

1.) Technical Engineer

Job Locations: Port Harcourt, Rivers & Kano
Employment Type: Full-time

Position Summary


	We are looking for a hands-on and customer-focused Technical Support Engineer.
	You will be the key technical face of usin Nigeria, responsible for the installation, commissioning, maintenance, and support of our advanced energy storage systems.
	Your role is critical to ensuring customer satisfaction, product reliability, and the successful deployment of our projects on the ground.


Key Responsibilities
On-site Deployment & Commissioning:


	Lead the on-site installation, debugging, and functional testing of energy storage systems (including lithium batteries, inverters, BMS/EMS, etc.) for clients across Nigeria.
	Ensure all work complies with company standards, local electrical codes, and safety regulations for seamless project handover.
	Technical Troubleshooting & Support: Serve as the primary point of contact for resolving customer technical issues. Diagnose and troubleshoot system faults either remotely via phone/online tools or through on-site visits.
	Customer Training & Enablement: Conduct comprehensive operation and maintenance training for customers and their operators, adapting your approach to the local context.
	Assist in developing and localizing simple, clear training materials and manuals to enhance customers' long-term system management capabilities.
	Cross-functional Collaboration & Feedback: Act as the vital link between the field and our headquarters.
	Provide clear, timely feedback to the R&D and Sales teams regarding product performance, recurring issues, and local market needs to drive product and service improvement.
	Coordinate with logistics and local partners for spare parts and service activities.


Qualifications and Requirements


	Bachelor's Degree or Higher National Diploma (HND) in Electrical Engineering, Power Electronics, Renewable Energy, or a related field.
	Minimum of 1 - 2 years of hands-on experience? in field service, technical support, or maintenance roles, preferably with power systems, UPS, solar inverters, or battery energy storage systems.
	Fluency in English (written and spoken) is mandatory for professional communication.
	Prior experience working with international companies or on technical projects within Nigeria/West Africa is highly preferred.
	Excellent customer service orientation and communication skills.


Salary
N350,000 - N450,000 / month.

Application Closing Date: 21st April, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

 

 

2.) Sales Manager

Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities?


	Field Sales Execution: Develop and implement effective sales strategies tailored to the Nigerian market to achieve and exceed sales targets for photovoltaic, energy storage, new energy products, and photovoltaic modules. Identify potential customers through street promotions, cold visits, and retail store visits, including distributors, installers, and end - users, and drive sales through proactive prospecting, presentations, and negotiations.?
	Basic Channel Development: Support maintenance of existing local dealer channels by visiting to ensure proper product display and provide foundational sales training. Seek and report potential new distribution partners and assist in initial partnership discussions.
	Customer Relationship Management: Directly engage customers to understand customer needs, provide professional product recommendations and solutions, and ensure high - quality after - sales service to drive customer satisfaction and repeat business. Build and maintain long - term, mutually beneficial relationships with customers in Nigeria.
	Market Analysis: Provide regular market reports and feedback to the management team. Keep a close eye on the Nigerian photovoltaic, energy storage, and new energy market trends, competitor activities, and local policy updates.
	Cross-Functional Collaboration: Collaborate closely with cross - functional teams, including marketing, product development, and logistics, to ensure seamless coordination in product promotion, delivery, and customer support.?


Qualifications?


	Experience: 1–3 years of offline sales experience in the solar energy, photovoltaic, energy storage, new energy, or photovoltaic module industry. Proven track record of achieving sales targets in a similar field, especially in the Nigerian market.
	Skills: Strong face-to-face communication skills in English and local languages (Hausa, Yoruba, Igbo).Resilient to outdoor work and adaptable to non-office environments.Basic digital literacy.
	Personal Traits: Self-motivated, comfortable starting in an execution-focused role, and able to thrive in a "volume-driven" sales model.


Salary
N350,000 - N700,000 per month.

Application Closing Date: 30th April, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Applications to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

 

3.) Marketing Operations Supervisor

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Working time: Monday to Saturday, from 8 am to 17:30 pm

Job Responsibilities


	Platform Operation & Management: Fully responsible for the daily operation of majorsocial media platforms (TiktokFacebook, YouTube, Instagram, Twitter/X) tailored to the Nigerian market. This includes content publishing, fan interaction, public opinion monitoring and analysis (focusing on Nigerian local public opinion), formulating and implementing platform operation strategies that align with Nigerian user preferences, and enhancing brand visibility and user engagement in the Nigerian market.
	Content Creation & Optimization: Independently complete copywriting for localsocial media platforms, create attractive promotional copy combined with platform characteristics and Nigerian user needs; proficiently use video editing software to complete short video editing and post-production, and create high-quality video content suitable for Nigerian audiences; possess graphic design capabilities, independently complete the design of posters, pictures and other visual materials that conform to Nigerian aesthetic habits, ensure high-quality presentation of content in both vision and copywriting, and improve user conversion rate in the Nigerian market.
	Data Monitoring & Analysis: Regularly collect, sort out and analyze the operation data of each platform in the Nigerian market, such as fan growth, interaction rate, click-through rate, etc. Optimize operation strategies and content directions based on data analysis results, formulate effective promotion plans suitable for the Nigerian market, and improve marketing effectiveness.
	Nigerian Market Research: In-depth research on the dynamics of Nigeria's social media market, local user behavior habits and competitors' situation, timely grasp industry trends in Nigeria, and provide data support and feasible suggestions for the company's marketing strategies in the Nigerian market.
	Cross-departmental Collaboration: Work closely with sales, productand other departments to jointly formulate promotion plans that meet the needs of the Nigerian market, and ensure the consistency and effectiveness of brand information transmission in Nigeria.


Job Qualifications


	Bachelor's Degree or above, major in Marketing, Journalism and Communication, English or related fields is preferred. Good listening, speaking, reading and writing skills in English; able to fluently create copywriting and communicate in English.
	3-5 years or more of experience in social media operation in the Nigerian market, familiar with the rules and operation models of Tiktok, Facebook, YouTube, Instagram, Twitter/X in Nigeria, and candidates with successful social media promotion cases in the Nigerian market are preferred.
	Excellent copywriting skills, able to create attractive copywriting according to the style of different platforms and the characteristics of Nigerian audiences; proficient in short video editing software such as Premiere, familiar with graphic design tools such as Photoshop, and able to independently complete the production and optimization of videos and pictures suitable for the Nigerian market.
	Sensitive to data, with strong data analysis ability, able to find problems through data and put forward optimization schemes suitable for the Nigerian market; good market insight and adaptability, able to quickly adapt to changes in Nigeria's social media market.
	Good team spirit, communication skills and execution ability, able to work under pressure and adapt to the fast-paced working environment in Nigeria.


Salary
N500,000 - N700,000 / Month.

Application Closing Date: 31st March, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Applications to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: For more information WhatsApp:    

    

        Click here to Apply

Head of HR / HR Director Job at Create Her Future Initiative (CHFI)




        
    

        
        Create Her Future Initiative (CHFI) is a tech-driven nonprofit organization committed to empowering underserved women and girls through education, digital inclusion, entrepreneurship, and community support. It works to bridge opportunity gaps by providing access to digital and AI skills training, educational support, mentorship, and economic empowerment programs that help women build sustainable futures. Through initiatives such as outreach programs, grants, and innovation-focused projects, CHFI creates practical pathways for women and girls to grow, lead, and achieve financial independence while making a meaningful impact in their communities.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Head of HR / HR Director
Job Location: Lagos / Abuja 
Employment Type: Full Time

Job Summary


	Create HerFuture Initiative is seeking an experienced and people-focused Head of HR / HR Director to build and lead our human resources function.


About the Role


	The Head of HR will oversee recruitment, HR systems, policy development, compliance, and people management creating a strong, positive organizational culture.


Requirements


	Bachelor's or Master's degree required.
	5+ years of HR leadership experience
	Expertise in recruitment, systems design, and people management
	Strong knowledge of policy development and compliance.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their resume and portfolio, along with a short summary of your experience, to: [email protected] or [email protected]  using "Head of HR / HR Director" as the subject of the mail.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "UI/UX Designer",
  "description": "Proforce Galaxies is an indigenous solution provider that proffer solutions to the myriad of new security challenges with the use of new discoveries in space and satellite technologies. Proforce Galaxies has the potency to offer top notch security surveillance of Homeland Security, Railway Track Monitoring, Crowd Control, Airport, Stadium, Border and Perimeter Surveillance and Oil &amp; Gas Facility Protection, Defence and Law Enforcement Agencies with the use of homegrown deployed satellite.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: UI/UX Designer

Job Location:&nbsp;Ode-Remo, Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Overview


	Proforce Galaxies Limited is seeking a creative and detail-oriented UI/UX Designer to join our technology team.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for designing intuitive, user-centered interfaces that deliver seamless and engaging experiences across web, mobile, and desktop platforms.
	You will play a key role in transforming complex satellite and geospatial data into clear, visually compelling, and easy-to-use digital experiences.


Key Responsibilities
UI/UX Design:


	Lead the end-to-end design process from research and wireframes to high-fidelity designs.
	Create user-centered designs using tools such as Figma, Adobe XD, Sketch, or InVision.
	Develop intuitive interfaces that simplify complex data and workflows.
	Ensure consistency across all digital products through well-defined design systems.
	Conduct usability testing and apply feedback to improve user experience.
	Maintain accessibility and usability standards across all platforms.


Collaboration &amp; Innovation:


	Work closely with developers, GIS analysts, and Computer Vision (AI) teams to translate requirements into functional designs.
	Design interactive dashboards, maps, and geospatial visualizations.
	Contribute to documentation of design systems, components, and workflows.
	Stay updated with UI/UX trends, tools, and best practices.


Qualifications


	Bachelor&rsquo;s or Master&rsquo;s degree in Design, Human-Computer Interaction, Computer Science, or a related field.
	Minimum of 2&ndash;3 years of professional experience in UI/UX design.
	Strong portfolio showcasing user-centered design projects.
	Proficiency in design tools such as Figma, Adobe XD, Sketch, or InVision.
	Solid understanding of responsive design, accessibility standards, and usability principles.
	Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail.
	Excellent communication and collaboration skills.


Preferred Qualifications:


	Experience designing for data-heavy applications (e.g., dashboards, analytics platforms).
	Familiarity with geospatial or map-based interfaces.
	Basic understanding of front-end technologies (HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React).
	Experience working with real-time or data-driven interfaces.


Why Join Us?


	Salary Range:&nbsp;N200,000 &ndash; N300,000 per month.&nbsp;
	This role offers the opportunity to design impactful digital experiences in the space-tech industry.
	At Proforce Galaxies Limited, you will contribute to shaping how users interact with satellite and geospatial data turning complexity into clarity through thoughtful design.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their updated CV,&nbsp;a&nbsp;Portfolio, links to past projects,&nbsp;Proof of hands-on experience to:&nbsp;hrgalaxies@proforcedefence.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note:&nbsp;Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.",

UI/UX Designer Job at Proforce Galaxies Limited




        
    

        
        Proforce Galaxies is an indigenous solution provider that proffer solutions to the myriad of new security challenges with the use of new discoveries in space and satellite technologies. Proforce Galaxies has the potency to offer top notch security surveillance of Homeland Security, Railway Track Monitoring, Crowd Control, Airport, Stadium, Border and Perimeter Surveillance and Oil & Gas Facility Protection, Defence and Law Enforcement Agencies with the use of homegrown deployed satellite.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: UI/UX Designer

Job Location: Ode-Remo, Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Overview
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Proforce Galaxies Limited is seeking a creative and detail-oriented UI/UX Designer to join our technology team.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for designing intuitive, user-centered interfaces that deliver seamless and engaging experiences across web, mobile, and desktop platforms.
	You will play a key role in transforming complex satellite and geospatial data into clear, visually compelling, and easy-to-use digital experiences.


Key Responsibilities
UI/UX Design:


	Lead the end-to-end design process from research and wireframes to high-fidelity designs.
	Create user-centered designs using tools such as Figma, Adobe XD, Sketch, or InVision.
	Develop intuitive interfaces that simplify complex data and workflows.
	Ensure consistency across all digital products through well-defined design systems.
	Conduct usability testing and apply feedback to improve user experience.
	Maintain accessibility and usability standards across all platforms.


Collaboration & Innovation:


	Work closely with developers, GIS analysts, and Computer Vision (AI) teams to translate requirements into functional designs.
	Design interactive dashboards, maps, and geospatial visualizations.
	Contribute to documentation of design systems, components, and workflows.
	Stay updated with UI/UX trends, tools, and best practices.


Qualifications


	Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Design, Human-Computer Interaction, Computer Science, or a related field.
	Minimum of 2–3 years of professional experience in UI/UX design.
	Strong portfolio showcasing user-centered design projects.
	Proficiency in design tools such as Figma, Adobe XD, Sketch, or InVision.
	Solid understanding of responsive design, accessibility standards, and usability principles.
	Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail.
	Excellent communication and collaboration skills.


Preferred Qualifications:


	Experience designing for data-heavy applications (e.g., dashboards, analytics platforms).
	Familiarity with geospatial or map-based interfaces.
	Basic understanding of front-end technologies (HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React).
	Experience working with real-time or data-driven interfaces.


Why Join Us?


	Salary Range: N200,000 – N300,000 per month. 
	This role offers the opportunity to design impactful digital experiences in the space-tech industry.
	At Proforce Galaxies Limited, you will contribute to shaping how users interact with satellite and geospatial data turning complexity into clarity through thoughtful design.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their updated CV, a Portfolio, links to past projects, Proof of hands-on experience to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.    

    

        Click here to Apply
